title: Displacement of a Blue Fly
body: A blue fly lands on a sheet of graph paper at a point $$10.0$$ cm to the right of its left edge and $$8.0$$ cm above its bottom edge. It walks to a point $$5.0$$ cm from the left edge and $$5.0$$ cm from the bottom edge. With the origin at the lower-left corner of the paper, find the displacement vector of the fly.
